checklist_items.title: Verify strong authentication for critical governance actions
checklist_items.description: Check that actions like proposal submission and voting require strong authentication, such as a hardware wallet signature tied to the on-chain identity used for governance participation.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication (e.g., hardware wallet signature) for critical actions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit log demonstrating required signature verification, or code review confirming implementation.

checklist_items.title: Confirm proposal content immutability in storage
checklist_items.description: Check if the content of a submitted proposal is stored immutably after submission, either on-chain or in a system designed for immutability, to prevent post-submission tampering.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Store proposals immutably on-chain or use cryptographic hashing to verify integrity.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review results, storage configuration documentation.

checklist_items.title: Verify cryptographic hashing for proposal integrity checks
checklist_items.description: If proposals are not stored immutably, check that cryptographic hashes of the proposal content are generated upon submission and verified before critical actions (e.g., voting) to detect tampering.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Lack of integrity checks on proposal content.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Store proposals immutably on-chain or use cryptographic hashing to verify integrity.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review results, test plan and results demonstrating hash verification.
